nodes.context: Youth gang turned sophisticated criminal organization active in Northwest Territories and British Columbia, involved in drug trafficking, arms trafficking, and murder.
Outlaw motorcycle club active in Canada, involved in organized crime and drug trafficking.
Criminal gang based in British Columbia, involved in drug trafficking and violence.
Criminal gang based in British Columbia, involved in drug trafficking and organized crime.

edges.context: The 856 gang made ties to Hells Angels member Len Pelletier in 2007, indicating an alliance.
The gang is thought to be rivals of the Hells Angels after a member murdered Hells Angel Bob Green in 2016.
The infobox lists Red Scorpions as allies of the 856 Gang.
The infobox lists UN (gang) as rivals of the 856 Gang.
